Sirf Tere Liye, Simran

Ek Surprise hai
tere liye… 🤫

Kuch baatein jo kehna chahta tha,
aaj bol deta hoon…

Neeche scroll kar

Us Din Ki Baat

Woh Birthday wala
din… 🌄

🛕

Jinsharnam — Ek Alag Hi Shanti

Pehle Tirth pe jaana… ussi peace ke saath din ki shuruaat — yaar woh feel hi alag thi.

🍦

Parsi Dairy Farm — Hansi aur Masti

Wo lunch, woh hasna, woh Kaira ki presence — perfect family moment tha yeh.

🌊

Daman — Glitches aur Sab

Glitches bhi the, par tu saath thi toh sab theek tha. Actually sab perfect tha. 🙃

💫

Overall — Ek Pura Din Tera Gift

Sirf places nahi — us din ka har pal tu ne plan kiya, feel kiya, aur diya mujhe.

Jo Tune Diya

Tu jaanti hai mujhe khud se zyaada… 🥹

📱

Last Anniversary

Woh phone jo main kabhi khud nahi khareedta — tune khareed ke diya.

👟

Is Birthday

Woh shoes jo wishlist mein saalo se the — tune yaad rakhi. Tune diye.

🐰

Rabbit T-Shirts

Pura saal tu pahaanta hai mujhe — woh rare shirts jo main khud nahi leta.

💕

Teri Care

Yeh sab gifts nahi — yeh teri aankhon ka pyaar hai jo cheezein ban gaya.

Ek Sawaal…

Kya tu jaanna chahti hai ki us birthday pe maine kya feel kiya? 🎂

💌

Mere Dil Se — Sirf Tere Liye, Simran

✨ Main shayad utna expressive insaan nahi hoon… tu yeh baat mujhse zyada achhi tarah jaanti hai. Par aaj dil ne zor diya ki jo mehsoos karta hoon, woh tujhe bataun — kyunki tu har ek lafz sunne ki haqdaar hai. 🌸
🌄 Mera birthday tha, toh mujhe pata tha ki tu kuch special karegi… par yeh bilkul nahi pata tha ki woh itna gehra, itna khoobsurat aur itna yaadgaar hoga. Woh long drive 🚗, car mein Kaira ke liye jo tune pyaara sa setup kiya 🛏️, Jinsharnam ki woh shaanti 🛕, Parsi Dairy ki hasi 🍦😄, Daman ki woh thakaan 🌊 aur beech beech mein hamari chhoti chhoti baatein… yeh sab sirf moments nahi the — yeh meri zindagi ke sabse khoobsurat hisson mein se ek ban gaye hain. Aur yeh sab tune mujhe diya hai. 💝
👟 Jab maine woh shoes dekhe na… honestly, mujhe aisa laga jaise tune meri aankhon se dekha ho. Itni perfectly samajhna kisi ko — yeh sirf pyaar nahi, yeh connection hai. Tu jaanti hai main khud par itna kharch nahi karta… par tu karti hai. Aur sirf isliye nahi ki tu mujhe pamper karna chahti hai, balki isliye kyunki tu mujhe samajhti hai — itna gehra ki mujhe khud se bhi zyada jaanti hai. Yeh baat mujhe har baar andar tak chhoo jaati hai. 🥹
🐰 Aur woh Rare Rabbit shirts… ek ek karke poore saal tune diye. Tune notice kiya 👀, yaad rakha 💭, effort liya… aur phir itne pyaar se diya 🎁. Kisi ke liye yeh chhoti baat ho sakti hai, par mere liye yeh tere pyaar ka sabse sachcha proof hai — ki tu sirf kehti nahi, tu har din dikhati hai. ✨
💕 Aur Kaira… meri jaan. Uski muskaan mein tera chehra dikh jaata hai 🥰. Uski aankhon mein wohi pyaar hai jo tu mujhe deti hai. Tum dono saath mein meri poori duniya ho. Jab bhi main ruk ke sochta hoon ki meri zindagi itni acchi kaise hai… toh har baar ek hi jawab aata hai — tum dono. 🌍
🤍 Simran, sach kahun toh tujhse pehle kisi ne mujhe itna pyaar nahi diya. Itni care, itna dhyaan, itni sincerity… main shayad har baar keh nahi paata, par main har roz feel karta hoon. Tu meri zindagi ka woh hissa hai jiske bina main khud ko adhura mehsoos karta hoon. 💔 ➡️ 💖
🍀 Main genuinely bahut lucky hoon ki tu meri zindagi mein hai. Bohot logon ko pyaar milta hai… par mujhe tu mili hai — aur yeh meri sabse badi khushkismati hai. Tu sirf meri partner nahi hai — tu meri strength hai 💪, meri comfort hai 🫂, meri ghar jaisi feeling hai. 🏡
🎂 Birthday pe jo sab mila… woh gifts nahi the — woh tera pyaar tha, tera effort tha, tera dil tha. Aur woh kisi bhi cheez se zyada keemti hai mere liye. Hamesha rahega. 💛
🙏 Thank you mere saath rehne ke liye. Thank you har mushkil mein mere saath khade rehne ke liye 🤝. Thank you Kaira ko is duniya mein laane ke liye 👶🌸. Aur sabse zyada — thank you mujhe itna gehra samajhne aur bina shart pyaar karne ke liye. ❤️‍🔥
🌹 Main hamesha shayad perfect nahi rahunga… par ek baat pakki hai — main tujhe hamesha utna hi, aur har din thoda zyada pyaar karta rahunga. ❤️

— Tera Mohit 💛  forever. 🌹
